title: Shipping Assistant
description:
Job Highlight:

  • 5 Days work
  • Sign-On Bonus
  • Retention Bonus
  • Career progression
  • Salary adjustment upon successfully confirmation during probation period
  • Company transport pick up from / to CCK / Jurong East / Boon Lay / Bedok


Job Description

  • Processing of import and export customs permits for warehouse goods
  • Processing of the duty payment permit for local domestic sale
  • Liaise with customs officer for the shipment arrivals and departure
  • Ensure accuracy of the information applied in the customs permit
  • Responsible for updating the customers on the status of shipment arrival and departure
  • Arrange for the cheque requisition to shipping carrier with Finance division
  • Arrange for prompt customs clearance with third party service providers
  • Liaise with internal customers for goods and receipt and release

Job Requirements

  • GCE 'O' level, GCE 'A' level, Diploma/Advanced/Higher/Graduate Diploma in Business studies/ Administration management, Logistics/Transportation or equivalent.
  • At least 1 year of relevant working experience in the logistics industry preferred
  • Ability to work in a dynamic and fast pace environment while maintaining a positive attitude and providing exemplary customers services
  • Possess strong admin and communication skills
  • Able to perform overtime when required
  • Proficiency in MS office, Excel and Warehouse Management System (WMS)/Exceed system
  • Added advantage if possess Certificate of Customs Competency Test for Declarants by Singapore Customs

postedCompany.description:
LF Logistics is part of A.P. Moller – Maersk, an integrated container logistics company working to connect and simplify its customers’ supply chains. As the logistics partner of choice for major local and multinational companies, LF Logistics offers a suite of integrated logistics and supply chain management services in the Fast Moving Consumer Goods, Food & Beverage, Footwear & Apparel and Retail sectors.  Through its comprehensive distribution network in Asia, LF Logistics collaborates closely with over 400 brand owners and retailers to provide tailor-made warehousing and transport management solutions.  Through its global freight forwarding presence, LF Logistics connects origins and destinations with flexibility, timeliness and responsiveness.  Today, with the increasing importance of e-commerce and cross border trades, LF Logistics provides a total omnichannel-fulfilment solution and operates major regional hubs and consolidation centres to optimise inventory flow and ensure quick response.


We are committed to put our customers’ needs first. Global Markets are evolving fast, and we aim to connect, protect, and simplify our customers’ supply chain in response to these changes. We are on an exciting journey to transform the flow of goods, data and materials that sustain people, businesses and economies the world over – driving our vision as a true global integrator.
postedCompany.name: LF LOGISTICS SERVICES PTE. LTD.
